name: Djinn Rust
description: Rust toolchain (rustup) + rust-analyzer. rust-analyzer emits SCIP natively (`rust-analyzer scip`), so no separate indexer is installed.

toolchain.description: Toolchain passed to `rustup toolchain install`. Accepts any string rustup understands: `stable`, `beta`, `nightly`, `1.86.0`, `nightly-2026-04-01`, etc.
